fundamentals.name: State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust
fundamentals.longBusinessSummary: The trust seeks to achieve its investment objective by holding a portfolio of the common stocks that are included in the index (the “Portfolio”), with the weight of each stock in the Portfolio substantially corresponding to the weight of such stock in the index.

news.paragraph: Recent articles highlight underperformance of specific ETFs like XOVR and SPHD relative to the S&P 500, despite the broader index experiencing a strong eight-week stretch. One article notes that consumer sentiment has hit a 70-year low even as the S&P 500 continues to rally. The collection of headlines suggests a disconnect between broad market gains and the performance of certain thematic or niche investment products.

headlines.title: XOVR Promised Pre IPO SpaceX Upside, But It Is Down 2% YTD While the S&P 500 Is Up 9%
